artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a battered hinged sandwich board worn like sacred armor, its two blank weathered panels strapped over invisible shoulders and trailing frayed cords, faintly haloed in cold gold light against a blood-dark sky and looming clock tower. The object stands proud and martyred, dead-center. Tall reverent framing, bone white washes bleeding into smoky black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Sign of the Times
text:
Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature attacks, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock." It carries the sandwich board into battle.
Equip {2}
flavorText: REPENT, NOW HIRING, FREE PARKING IN BACK, THE END IS NIGH — all on one board. Real estate is at a premium during the apocalypse.
